title: howardia richardii
intro: Howardia richardii, also known as Desert Pincushion or Lophocactus, is a type of cactus plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Howardia richardii include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially reducing the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. Herbal preparations of Howardia richardii can be made into a tincture, salve, or tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
